citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: • Offer advice and information on finding a flat in the private sector • Set up flat viewings by calling estate agents on your behalf • Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further

ENSA Advice … can offer the following: • Advice on how to find accommodation • Look over leases and tenancy agreements • Advice on tenant rights and responsibilities • Help with disputes (landlord, flatmates, deposit)

findings.text: The Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 describes a support service that offers advice, flat viewings, and signposting, and an ENSA Advice service for accommodation and tenant rights.
The brochure does not contain any reference to Anfal or any individual student, nor any record of brochure provision or support service access.
No emails, case notes, or other records of Anfal's identity or interactions were provided in this work order. The task cannot be completed with the available source material.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Evidence Map: Brochure Provision or Support Service Access by Anfal

## Source Reviewed
- **NAP-SRC-0014**: Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 (A5 Print).pdf
  - Describes accommodation support service and ENSA Advice.
  - No mention of Anfal or any individual student.
  - No record of brochure provision or support service access.

## Finding
No evidence found in the provided source. The brochure is a general informational document and does not document any specific interaction with Anfal.

## Recommendation
Search actual email and case note sources (e.g., accommodation@napier.ac.uk correspondence, ENSA Advice case notes) for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map for Brochure/Support Service Access by Anfal

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's email and case note sources (e.g., accommodation@napier.ac.uk correspondence, ENSA Advice case notes, any internal support records) for any record that the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 was provided to Anfal, or that Anfal accessed the accommodation support service or ENSA Advice. Report any findings with direct quotes and source identifiers.
proposed_tasks.title: Search email and case note sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

summary: Task requested search of email and case note sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. The only source provided is NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 PDF). No emails, case notes, or records of Anfal's identity or interactions are present. The brochure describes the accommodation support service and ENSA Advice but does not document any specific provision to Anfal. No evidence of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal was found. A follow-up task is proposed to search actual email and case note sources.

uncertainties.description: No email or case note sources were provided; the only source is a general brochure. It is unknown whether any records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal exist in the matter.
